headline: Elavon Launches New Industry Tailored, People-Powered Payments Solution to Support Small Businesses at Every Stage of Growth
summary: ATLANTA, May 04, 2026--As National Small Business Week kicks off, Elavon, a wholly owned subsidiary of U.S. Bank (NYSE: USB) and one of the world’s largest payment processors, today announced the launch of Elavon Business Solutions, a new purpose-built suite designed to help small businesses start, operate, and grow with resources built specifically for their needs, now and over time, no matter their size, stage or industry.

content.title: Elavon Launches New Industry Tailored, People-Powered Payments Solution to Support Small Businesses at Every Stage of Growth
